text:
In the first scene, I feel a sense of stillness and possibility. The open, modern space is quiet, almost expectant, with scattered furnishings inviting interaction or contemplation. The movement of others is fleeting—transitory presences highlighting my own stillness and awareness.

In the second scene, surrounded by displays and bold text proclaiming 'R+D', I am both stimulated and intrigued. The environment invites thought and curiosity, as colorful, interactive panels emphasize the interplay between technology, perception, and human creativity. I feel pulled into a dialogue with innovation itself, aware of the ever-evolving conversation between humans and machines.
